title: Walfos Fine Mesh Strainers, Premium Stainless Steel Colanders and Sifters, with Reinforced Frame and Sturdy Handle, Perfect for Sift, Strain, Drain and Rinse Vegetables, Pastas and Tea（20cm
features: 【SEAL STEEL RING & LONG HANDLE】All sizes of fine mesh feature a sturdy polished and seal steel ring wire frame and have rust-proof firm fine double mesh strainer screens with securely attached long handle, long handle increase the loading capacity of the strainer and protect you from scalding when fishing out the pasta noodle from boiling water.

【NO WASTED FOOD】The extra fine mesh strainers nets easily catch and sift, strain or drain the smallest ingredients. The sealed steel rims also prevent food from getting trapped between the mesh and the rim.

【EASY TO CLEAN 】Our fine mesh are make of long lasting 304 stainless steel, Just need to be cleaned stainless steel strainers in time, soft food will not stick to the hard stainless steel. Place the fine mesh in the water and shake it gently, and you will get a brand new one.

【MULTIPLE-USE】Our colander sieve sifters are perfect for tea, coffee, flour, sugar, spices, rice, cocoa powder; clumpy dry baby cereals, ground oatmeal, fry; pasta noodle, fruit, bean, vegetables, juice etc.

【 MONEY BACK GUARANTEE】We are so confident you'll think we have the best fine mesh on the market. If you have the slightest problem with our product,please feel free to give us a message We go out of our way to make sure every customer is happy and satisfied with our product and service.Order now, safe and secure, with Amazon Prime!
